name: BLE Client
description: The `ble_client` component enables connections to Bluetooth Low Energy devices in order to query and control them. This component does not expose any sensors or output components itself, but merely manages connections to them for use by other components.

config_entries.label: MAC Address
config_entries.description: The MAC address of the BLE device to connect to.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: The ID to use for code generation, and for reference by dependent components.

config_entries.label: Auto Connect
config_entries.description: If true the device will be automatically connected when found by the [Esp32 Ble Tracker](https://esphome.io/components/esp32_ble_tracker/). Defaults to true.
